title: AxShulkers
description: A customizable & secure shulker viewer plugin

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**

[![https://i.imgur.com/TxLSFlx.png](https://i.imgur.com/TxLSFlx.png)](https://discord.gg/je7ZFGtQ7z)
<details><summary>Text Transcript</summary>
AxShulkers
A customizable & dupe-proof shulker viewer plugin

WHAT IS AXSHULKERS?
A highly customizable shulker viewer plugin that is dupe free by design! Open your shulkers anywhere, you don't even need to place them

FEATURES

Database Support
H2 and SQLite

Open Shulkers
Without placing them

Easy to use
The plugin is easy to use and fully customizable

HIGHLY CUSTOMIZABLE
Open & Close messages, sounds, inventory name, cooldown

BLACKLIST ITEMS
from shulker boxes, customizable

BANNED WORLDS
Disable shulker opening is specific worlds

COOLDOWNS
For shulker open

OBFUSCATION
shulker content, makes it impossible to see what is in a shulker without opening it

SUPPORT MINIMESSAGES
&#RRGGBB and legacy (&a) color codes

HOW IT WORKS

EVERY SHULKER is saved to a database and when they are interacted with, their inventory is loaded and kept in memory, which stops most duplication exploits that are present in other shulker viewer plugins.

IMPORTANT!
You must run /axshulkers clear before giving filled shulker boxes to players (for example before putting a shulker into a crate you should run this)

We don't read the shulker item's contents, but we read it from a database and shulkers work more like smart backpacks

</details>
